propertyDoesNotExist.description: Object literal specifying unknown properties - indicates schema mismatches
propertyDoesNotExist.primaryCause: Prisma schema vs application code mismatch

missingProperty.description: Property does not exist on type - missing Prisma models or relations
missingProperty.primaryCause: Incomplete Prisma schema or outdated generated types

typeAssignment.description: Argument type not assignable to parameter - logger and type mismatches
typeAssignment.primaryCause: Logger utility expecting string but receiving objects

implicitAny.description: Parameter implicitly has 'any' type - missing type annotations
implicitAny.primaryCause: Missing explicit type declarations in callbacks

incompatibleTypes.description: Type not assignable - structural type mismatches
incompatibleTypes.primaryCause: CORS config, validation errors, JSON serialization issues

enumTypeReference.description: Value being used as type - incorrect enum usage
enumTypeReference.primaryCause: Zod enum definitions vs Prisma enum types

spreadType.description: Spread types must be object types

duplicateImplementation.primaryCause: Pattern detection service has duplicate methods

conversionError.description: Type conversion may be a mistake

missingIterator.primaryCause: OpenAI streaming response type union issue

doesNotExist.description: Property does not exist with suggestion

Run 'npx prisma generate' after schema updates to ensure type synchronization

immediate.action: Update Logger interface to accept objects
immediate.details: Current logger expects string but receives objects in 20 locations. Either: 1) Update logger to accept Record<string, unknown>, or 2) Stringify all object arguments

shortTerm.action: Add index signatures to custom types used in JSON fields
shortTerm.details: Types like PatternStatistics, DocumentStructure need '[key: string]: JsonValue' for Prisma compatibility

shortTerm.action: Add explicit type annotations to callback parameters
shortTerm.details: 10 instances of implicit any in callbacks, particularly in GDPR routes and cache services

shortTerm.action: Fix type conversion errors in error-sanitizer middleware

shortTerm.action: Define proper SearchResponse type with documents and metadata

bestPractices.benefit: Catch potential undefined array access at compile time
Distinguish between undefined and missing properties

bestPractices.recommendation: Create dedicated type definition files for complex domain types
bestPractices.benefit: Better type reusability and reduced duplication

bestPractices.recommendation: Use Prisma.$extends for type-safe JSON field handling
bestPractices.benefit: Automatic type checking for JSON fields

bestPractices.recommendation: Add type tests using expect-type or similar
bestPractices.benefit: Ensure type contracts are maintained across refactoring

weaknesses: Large exclude list indicates architectural issues
Many services excluded from type checking
Bundler resolution may hide module issues
backend.recommendation: Gradually reduce exclude list by fixing type errors in excluded files

missingTypeDefinitions.issue: Type definition exists but not being recognized by compiler
missingTypeDefinitions.solution: Verify tsconfig types array includes custom type directory
